name: agent-autonomy-kit
tagline: ClawHub (70★): Stop waiting for prompts. Keep working.
verdict: Barely usable as a spec: it gives no concrete trigger phrasing for when to invoke it, no mechanism for how its 'queue' actually gets pulled from, and no defined format for its core deliverable, the daily report. An agent handed this cannot reliably act on it.

highlights.summary: No concrete situations, task types, or trigger phrasings; a dispatching agent cannot decide from this text alone when to invoke the skill.
No command, mechanism, or criteria given for how HEARTBEAT.md 'pulls from queue' or decides what work to do.
No format, location, or schema is ever given for the 'daily reports' deliverable, or for what 'overnight work' produces.
